title: ux-PlainText
text: ux-PlainText This section provides description for the logical UX widget ux-PlainText properties. ux-PlainText widget Table 1. Widget Summary Property Description Logical widget name: ux-PlainText Maps to physical widget: of type text Default definition: ux-PlainText=uxPlainText[syntax=ned] Supported triggers: onchange Use for: Displaying data that should not be edited by the user. Related Links uxplaintext The uxplaintext widget is a read-only control that displays field values only. The field is explicitly set to non-editable and cannot be modified by the user. UX Widgets Uniface UX provides a set of widgets that are implemented using the UX Widget Interface. This set is referred as UX Widgets. The sources of these widgets are available and allow changes and/or extensions to the widgets. In a default Uniface installation, you can find the sources in the <install>\uniface\webapps\uniface\common\ux folder. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
